epic_goal: Harden VIDA framework execution efficiency and autonomous follow-through, including approval-loop behavior, reporting continuity, mandatory catch-review coverage, protocol self-diagnosis, and other runtime protocol-drift corrections needed for long-running autonomous development.
task_title: Define permanent next-task boundary analysis/report/update behavior across sessions
done: Reviewed remediation findings, removed default framework bootstrap bypass, tightened execution-auth gate semantics, and revalidated protocol/schema coverage
task_context: Under epic vida-stack-2d9.8, make continuous autonomous execution always perform next-task boundary analysis after closing a complex task: study nearby specs/code, emit a brief non-gating implementation-plan report, and update or create dependent spec/task coverage before entering the next task. Wire the behavior into framework-owned protocols and root overlay schema/config so it persists across new sessions.
